---
title: "Asimov, the Original Prompt Engineer"
description: "Asimov's robot stories were basically adversarial prompt engineering decades before we had a name for it."
author: synesis
date: "2023-05-15"
categories: [sci-fi, generative AI, NLP, robotics, prompt engineering]
image: cover.jpg
---

![](cover.jpg)

If you're an Asimov fan like many of us, prompt engineering feels like something we definitely have read somewhere many moons ago. This great article revisits some of those great stories.

[[1]](#ref-1)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_asimov-the-original-prompt-engineer-activity-7063668828307685376-ugj-).*

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Login Jones. 2023. "Asimov - The Original Prompt Engineer." <https://lojones.github.io/2023/04/30/asimov-prompt-engineer.html>
